template.name: disbursement_allocate_return
template.description: Match a returned deposit from the Unallocated Customer (20900) account to a specific customer's Hold (20101) account. Mirrors on the allocation ledger by moving from Unallocated Customer - Master FBO (21900) to Customer - Master FBO Clearing (21101). Structurally identical to UC1's T5104 (consumer match) but in the disbursement returns context.

financial_statements_impact.description: Liability-to-liability reclassification on the economic ledger: Unallocated Customer (20900) decreases and Customer Hold (20101) increases by the same amount. Total liabilities unchanged.

Liability-to-liability reclassification on the allocation ledger: Unallocated Customer - Master FBO (21900) decreases and Customer - Master FBO Clearing (21101) increases. Total liabilities unchanged.

template.trigger: Reconciliation service matches an unallocated return deposit to a specific customer. Fires once per matched return.

ledger_scope_descriptions.fdic_tracking: FDIC tracking ledger (ID 5002) where the FDIC mirror reclassifies from Unallocated Customer - Master FBO to Customer - Master FBO Clearing.
ledger_scope_descriptions.operational: Operational ledger (ID 5001) where the returned deposit is reclassified from Unallocated Customer to Customer Hold.

accounting_treatments.description: Reclassify the returned deposit liability from the unallocated pool to a specific customer's hold account.
Mirror the reclassification on the allocation ledger for FDIC position tracking.

account_code_validations.description: Unallocated Customer - Disbursement Returns; debited to remove the returned amount from the unallocated pool.
Customer - Hold; credited to park the matched return in the customer's hold account pending release.
Unallocated Customer - Master FBO on the allocation ledger; debited to remove the FDIC position from the unallocated pool.
Customer - Master FBO Clearing on the allocation ledger; credited to establish the customer's FDIC position.

ach_file_id.description: ACH return file containing this return.

original_return_event_id.description: Links to the T5207 detail line event for lineage.

consumer_external_id.description: Consumer entity external identifier for the matched return.

legs.description: Reclassify the returned deposit from Unallocated Customer to the matched customer's Hold account.
Mirror the reclassification on the allocation ledger for FDIC position tracking.

examples.name: allocate_return_cust_a_200
examples.description: Match Customer A's $200.00 return: move from Unallocated Customer to Customer A Hold, with allocation ledger mirror.
